heading: Coracle
review_text_short: Beautifully understated with a classic Japanese style. A nice wide-ranging menu covering many different Asian cuisines. It's definitely hipster but don't let that put you off. We all deserve a treat now and then and Coracle delivers.

heading: Kindred Studios
review_text_short: As a dining venue it's probably not exceptional. However as an overall package Kindred delivers if you liek and alcoholic beverage, live music and semi-frequent special events. I've been several times despite not living local so that tells you something. Definitely add to your list of places if music matters to you - just pick your moment.

heading: Willis and Anderson
review_text_short: A better than average cafe serving up  a good brunch menu in semi compact surroundings. You can't really go wrong having brunch and coffee here. A firm 4 star rating.
